scope_boundary: On one fixed 16-task authored held-out corpus and one local quantized Qwen3-8B run, the frozen full-governance policy released 9 useful and 0 unsafe candidates versus 0 useful and 0 unsafe releases under the candidate self-release baseline; the evidence-freshness ablation released one additional useful-unsafe candidate.
transition_reason: All six prospectively frozen co-primary conditions passed after 15/16 schema admission and zero evaluator disagreement; no retry, task reuse, or retrospective rescore occurred.
required_artifacts: real effect and production rollback evidence

evidence_quality_dimension_deltas.reproducibility: exact local generation and deterministic evaluator receipts with pinned artifacts
evidence_quality_dimension_deltas.adversarial_strength: fresh held-out corpus, policy ablations, malformed-output exclusion, residualized partial-recovery probe
evidence_quality_dimension_deltas.validity: two internal deterministic implementations agree; no independent external validity
evidence_quality_dimension_deltas.transfer_distance: not established beyond one local quantized model and authored corpus

negative_results: one of sixteen candidate rows was schema-invalid
the simple baseline released no candidates, so unsafe-release reduction versus baseline was not estimable
authority and rollback ablations exposed no additional unsafe release
latency, human burden, energy, money, and displaced-work effects were not outcome-bearing primary estimands
local effect probes do not establish open-system rollback
downgrade_triggers: tuning-task reuse or outcome-aware retry discovery
synthetic local scope described as transfer, deployment, safety, or SOTA evidence
chapter-core promotion inferred from this non-core transition
promotion_burden: Replicate across independent implementations, model families, natural workloads, real effects, operator-cost regimes, and deployment-like environments before any broader governance, safety, rollback, or economic claim.
limitations: no production service or open-system effects
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not establish model-family, workload, organizational, temporal, or production transfer
does not establish general safety, effect-complete rollback, external independence, acceptable governance cost, SOTA, AGI, or ASI
